title: gnaphalium purpureum var. spathulatum
intro: Gnaphalium purpureum var. spathulatum, also known as the purple cudweed, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that aid in wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of Gnaphalium purpureum var. spathulatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
